# Flesh Trap
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Flesh%20Trap&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Flesh Trap
| desc = A trap made of flesh from Norghus' collection of corpses
| slot = trap
| tier = UT
| rarity = p
| cost = 150
| damage = 1400,1000,600
| radius = 10,6,3
| triggerradius = 5,3,2
| armtime = 5,5.5,6
| cooldown = 1
| fameb = 10
| bonuses = {{Stat|att|4}}{{Stat|dex|9}}
| effects = yes
| slowed = (large)4.5
| paralysed = (medium)5
| weak = (small)4
| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by Cookie Monster
}}
<noinclude>
{{NavTraps}}
</noinclude>
